steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 excess withholding tax on BMO dividend payment
Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty entitles CLIENT08 to 15% rate, not the 13.5% applied
Reference account 1401234567 and BMO ISIN CA0679011084 for specific payment identification
If RBC cannot process refund directly, request assistance with CRA refund claim procedure
